2605.05170.title: Design Conductor 2.0: An agent builds a TurboQuant inference accelerator in 80 hours
2605.05170.paper_summary: Driven by a rapid co-evolution of both harness and underlying models, LLM agents are improving at a dizzying pace. In our prior work (performed in Dec. 2025), we introduced "Design Conductor" (or just "Conductor"), a system capable of building a 5-stage Linux-capable RISC-V CPU in 12 hours. In this work, we introduce an updated multi-agent harness powered by frontier models released in April 2026, which is able to handle 80x larger tasks, at higher quality, fully autonomously. Following a brief introduction, we examine 4 designs that the system produced autonomously, including "VerTQ", an LLM inference accelerator which hard-wires support for TurboQuant in a 240-cycle pipeline, starting from the TurboQuant arXiv paper. VerTQ includes heavy compute processing, with 5129 FP16/32 units; the design was mapped to an FPGA at 125 MHz and consumes 5.7 mm^2 in TSMC 16FF (8 attention pipes). We review the key new characteristics that enabled these results. Finally, we analyze Design Conductor's token usage and other empirical characteristics, including its limitations.
2605.05170.paper_summary_zh: 受到快速共同演化的驅動，LLM 代理正在以令人眼花撩亂的速度進步。在我們之前的工作（於 2025 年 12 月進行）中，我們介紹了“設計指揮官”（或簡稱“指揮官”），這是一個能夠在 12 小時內構建 5 階段 Linux 可用的 RISC-V CPU 的系統。在這項工作中，我們介紹了一個更新的多代理工具，該工具由 2026 年 4 月發布的前沿模型驅動，能夠處理 80 倍更大的任務，以更高的質量，完全自動化。簡要介紹後，我們檢查了系統自主產生的 4 個設計，包括“VerTQ”，這是一個 LLM 推理加速器，硬連接支持 TurboQuant，並在 240 週期的管道中運行，起始於 TurboQuant 的 arXiv 論文。VerTQ 包含重型計算處理，擁有 5129 個 FP16/32 單元；該設計被映射到 125 MHz 的 FPGA，並在 TSMC 16FF 中消耗 5.7 mm^2（8 個注意力管道）。我們回顧了促成這些結果的關鍵新特徵。最後，我們分析了設計指揮官的標記使用情況和其他實證特徵，包括其限制。
2605.05170.author: The Verkor Team et.al.
2605.05170.authors: The Verkor Team, Ravi Krishna, Suresh Krishna, David Chin
